chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 263 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.1102/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 25.04.2024 Mr. Wazir Ali Mahar, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Azhar Ahmed Khan, Advocate has field power and a statement along with a copy of birth certificate of petitioner No.1, on behalf of respondent No.1. Statements have also been filed on behalf of respondents No.2 to 6, which are taken on record. Sub-Inspector Muhammad Kareem, IO of Police Station Berot Hub, District Hub has come from Balochistan has recorded statement of petitioner No.1, which is taken on record. Since the FIR has been registered in the Province of Balochistan, this Court has no jurisdiction to quash the same. As petitioner No.1 has made a statement that she has not been abducted, and learned Counsel for the petitioners has submitted that he would be satisfied if IO is directed to act in accordance with law. This petition is accordingly disposed of along with listed application with observation that IO shall act in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
